title: Method Demonstration Game
genericDescription: Demonstrate the student's primary method; make process visible through play; establish repeatable craft.
specificDescription: Build a game that foregrounds one method such as close reading, procedural poetics, archival interpretation, participatory performance, model prompting, agent design, or dataset critique. Include a method note.
gradingRubric: 30 pts method clarity; 20 pts execution quality; 20 pts track sophistication; 15 pts method note; 15 pts reflection.
